desc: Suministro de válvulas trunnion 6" TRUNNION BALL VALVE 3 PIECES, FULL PORT, CLASS 600, ASTM A-216 GR. WCB/WCC / A-105, ACCORDING TO API 608 AND API 6D, RAISED FACE FLANGED END ACCORDING TO ASME B16.5, DIMENSIONS AS PER ASME B16.10, SIDE ENTRY, CONSTRUCTION AS PER ASME B16.34, TESTS AS PER API 598, FIRE TEST AS PER API 6FD, BOLTED BONNET, NON-LUBRICATED REPLACEABLE BALL AND SEATS, 316SS BALL AND STEM, STAINLESS STEEL SEATS WITH NYLON INSERTS, VITON O-RING PACKING. WHEEL OPERATOR.
